given: Sentry form fields should highlight when navigation changes the URL hash via search routing

should_find.finding: BaseField listens only for hashchange, so useNavigate-driven search navigation changes the hash without triggering highlight state updates

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 0eaf4981d29133d6801b3269481f774c17208dcd. BaseField listens only for hashchange, so useNavigate-driven search navigation changes the hash without triggering highlight state updates
